name: desktop
description: Chiron is a project management and guidance application that lets users create development methodologies they can follow to plan and execute projects.
author: Fahad Alothman

scripts.build: bun --filter "@chiron/contracts" build && bun -e "import { rmSync } from 'node:fs'; rmSync('dist/desktop', { recursive: true, force: true });" && tsc -p tsconfig.build.json && bun build preload.ts --target=node --format=cjs --external electron --outfile dist/desktop/preload.cjs
scripts.build:release: CHIRON_DESKTOP_BUILD=true bun --filter web build && bun run build:runtime-db-template && bun --filter server build && bun --filter server bundle:desktop && bun run build
scripts.dev: bun run build && NODE_OPTIONS='--import tsx' ELECTRON_RENDERER_URL=${ELECTRON_RENDERER_URL:-http://localhost:3001} electron ./main.ts
scripts.package:mac: bun run build:icon:mac && bun run build:release && electron-builder --mac dmg zip
scripts.package:mac:dir: bun run build:icon:mac && bun run build:release && electron-builder --mac dir
